T30Pro GNSS Receiver

Professional RTK receiver supporting image survey workflows for improved field productivity.

Get a Quote Download Catalog
OverviewApplicationsSpecificationsDownloadsInquiry

Key Features

Supports image survey
Integrated radio
IMU tilt measurement
RTCM 3.x workflow
Buyer-focused value

Why overseas buyers choose this model

Professional RTK receiver supporting image survey workflows for improved field productivity.

✓

Photogrammetry and AR workflows help overseas dealers position the model as a productivity upgrade.

✓

Full-system GNSS tracking, IMU tilt and integrated communication options cover common survey scenarios.

✓

The compact receiver package is suitable for distributor demos, tender preparation and project delivery.

Applications

Typical project scenarios

Use the application cards as a quotation starting point. TOKNAV can confirm the final kit after checking project environment and delivery requirements.

Image survey

Recommended configuration and accessories can be confirmed according to the project site, correction method and buyer's country.

Surveying

Recommended configuration and accessories can be confirmed according to the project site, correction method and buyer's country.

Stakeout

Recommended configuration and accessories can be confirmed according to the project site, correction method and buyer's country.

Brochure-based details

Complete Specifications

The table below organizes key parameters from TOKNAV catalogs and model datasheets into procurement-friendly groups for easier comparison.

CMS Specifications

GNSS signalsGPS L1C/A, L1C, L2P(Y), L2C, L5; GLONASS L1/L2/L3; BDS B1I/B2I/B3I/B1C/B2a/B2b(PPP); Galileo E1/E5a/E5b/E6(PPP); QZSS L1/L2/L5; SBAS L1(PPP); NavIC L5 on supported firmware.
Channels / output1408 channels, NMEA-0183 output and RTCM 3.x correction I/O
Update frequency20Hz max
RTK accuracyHorizontal +/- (8mm+1ppm), Vertical +/- (15mm+1ppm)
Tilt correction<2cm within 60 degrees
AR stakeout accuracyHorizontal +/- (8mm+1ppm), Vertical +/- (15mm+1ppm) on T40/T40Pro
PhotogrammetryT30Pro/T40Pro include image survey or photogrammetry support
Laser measurementT30 laser within 5m; T40 laser module range up to 30m
AR camera1/2.8-inch sensor, f/2.5 aperture, 1920 x 1080 resolution on listed visual models
Image survey cameraT30Pro/T40Pro use 1/2.6-inch image survey camera, f/2.8 aperture, 1920 x 1080 resolution
Laser assist cameraT30/T40 use 1/3.06-inch laser assist camera, 4224 x 3200 resolution
Radio410-470MHz high-power transceiver; T30/T40 family supports up to 5W on selected models
NetworkLTE FDD, LTE TDD, WCDMA and GSM full Netcom bands depending on market version
Storage32GB storage
BatteryT30/T30Pro: 7.2V 13800mAh; T40/T40Pro: 7.2V 3400mAh x 2 removable batteries
EnduranceT30/T30Pro over 48 hours in controller network mode; T40/T40Pro over 20 hours in controller network mode
Operating temperature-20°C to +60°C
ProtectionIP68
Drop resistanceCan withstand a 1.5m drop at normal temperature
Dimensions / weightT30/T30Pro Phi174.9 x 104.9mm, 1500g; T40/T40Pro Phi160 x 103mm, 850g without battery

Buyer Notes

Parameters may be updated by the manufacturer. For quotation, distributor cooperation or dealer projects, please send your target application, quantity, country and required accessories so TOKNAV can confirm the latest configuration.

Procurement FAQ

Common Questions Before Purchase

What is T30Pro GNSS Receiver mainly used for?

T30Pro GNSS Receiver is mainly used for Image survey, Surveying, Stakeout. Buyers can confirm the final configuration based on project application, country, correction method and accessory requirements.

Can I request the latest datasheet and price for T30Pro GNSS Receiver?

Yes. Use the quote form on this page to request the latest datasheet, price, MOQ, lead time, packing list and recommended accessories for T30Pro GNSS Receiver.

Are the parameters final for every market?

Product parameters may be updated by the manufacturer and can vary by configuration or regional version. TOKNAV should confirm the latest configuration before quotation or shipment.

Procurement support

Need help choosing a complete receiver kit?

Send your model, target quantity, market country, application and accessory preference. TOKNAV can prepare a practical quote package for distributor review or project bidding.
